'''dojathaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:sabotageable|sabotageable]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-j-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sabotageable|sabotageable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dojathaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dojathithi|dojathithi]] || [[word:dojathiji|dojathiji]] || [[word:dojathishi|dojathishi]] || [[word:dojathiki|dojathiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dojathuthuthu|dojathuthuthu]] || [[word:dojathujuju|dojathujuju]] || [[word:dojathushushu|dojathushushu]] || [[word:dojathukuku|dojathukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dojathuthu|dojathuthu]] || [[word:dojathuju|dojathuju]] || [[word:dojathushu|dojathushu]] || [[word:dojathuku|dojathuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dojathufthuf|dojathufthuf]] || [[word:dojathufjuf|dojathufjuf]] || [[word:dojathufshuf|dojathufshuf]] || [[word:dojathufkuf|dojathufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dojathethe|dojathethe]] || [[word:dojatheje|dojatheje]] || [[word:dojatheshe|dojatheshe]] || [[word:dojatheke|dojatheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dojathothotho|dojathothotho]] || [[word:dojathojojo|dojathojojo]] || [[word:dojathoshosho|dojathoshosho]] || [[word:dojathokoko|dojathokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dojathotho|dojathotho]] || [[word:dojathojo|dojathojo]] || [[word:dojathosho|dojathosho]] || [[word:dojathoko|dojathoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dojathofthof|dojathofthof]] || [[word:dojathofjof|dojathofjof]] || [[word:dojathofshof|dojathofshof]] || [[word:dojathofkof|dojathofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dojathïfthïf|dojathïfthïf]] || [[word:dojathïfjïf|dojathïfjïf]] || [[word:dojathïfshïf|dojathïfshïf]] || [[word:dojathïfkïf|dojathïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dojathïfthïfthïf|dojathïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:dojathïfjïfjïf|dojathïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:dojathïfshïfshïf|dojathïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:dojathïfkïfkïf|dojathïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dojathïfthïf|dojathïfthïf]] || [[word:dojathïfjïf|dojathïfjïf]] || [[word:dojathïfshïf|dojathïfshïf]] || [[word:dojathïfkïf|dojathïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dojathïfthïf|dojathïfthïf]] || [[word:dojathïfjïf|dojathïfjïf]] || [[word:dojathïfshïf|dojathïfshïf]] || [[word:dojathïfkïf|dojathïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dojathæthæ|dojathæthæ]] || [[word:dojathæjæ|dojathæjæ]] || [[word:dojathæshæ|dojathæshæ]] || [[word:dojathækæ|dojathækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dojathathatha|dojathathatha]] || [[word:dojathajaja|dojathajaja]] || [[word:dojathashasha|dojathashasha]] || [[word:dojathakaka|dojathakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dojathatha|dojathatha]] || [[word:dojathaja|dojathaja]] || [[word:dojathasha|dojathasha]] || [[word:dojathaka|dojathaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dojathafthaf|dojathafthaf]] || [[word:dojathafjaf|dojathafjaf]] || [[word:dojathafshaf|dojathafshaf]] || [[word:dojathafkaf|dojathafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dojathasha|dojathasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dojathshësha|dojathshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dojathrosha|dojathrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dojathmusha|dojathmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dojathyasha|dojathyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godojathnkshësha|godojathnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godojathnkrosha|godojathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godojathnkmusha|godojathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godojathnkyasha|godojathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dojajathasha|dojajathasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dojajathshësha|dojajathshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dojajathrosha|dojajathrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dojajathmusha|dojajathmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dojajathyasha|dojajathyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godojajathnkshësha|godojajathnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godojajathnkrosha|godojajathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godojajathnkmusha|godojajathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godojajathnkyasha|godojajathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dejæthasha|dejæthasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dejæthshësha|dejæthshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dejæthrosha|dejæthrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dejæthmusha|dejæthmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dejæthyasha|dejæthyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godejæthnkshësha|godejæthnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godejæthnkrosha|godejæthnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godejæthnkmusha|godejæthnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godejæthnkyasha|godejæthnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dojfathasha|dojfathasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dojfathshësha|dojfathshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dojfathrosha|dojfathrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dojfathmusha|dojfathmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dojfathyasha|dojfathyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godojfathnkshësha|godojfathnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godojfathnkrosha|godojfathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godojfathnkmusha|godojfathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godojfathnkyasha|godojfathnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
